/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/spectrum_analyzer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/spectrum_analyzer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spectrum_analyzer.dir/src/circular_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spectrum_analyzer.dir/src/capture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spectrum_analyzer.dir/src/processing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spectrum_analyzer.dir/src/display.cpp.o -o spectrum_analyzer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbladeRF.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfftw3f.so libimgui.a -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.4
